title: Minecraft: Tears of Elytra
description: Plays sound effects and music from The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom when gliding with an elytra, complete with custom sound cues from the game.
body:
Tears of Elytra dynamically plays the skydiving music mechanic from The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom when you use an elytra.

The mod also tracks your descent and plays an approach cue as the ground nears, then plays the landing sound from TOTK on touchdown. An on-screen text names the biome you landed in and the distance you covered, acommpanied by the "location discovered" sound effect from TOTK.

Features:

- Dynamic falling music with smooth fade in/out "Landing soon" approach cue triggered by proximity to the ground. 
  
- Touchdown landing sound Landing toast showing biome and horizontal distance flown. 
  
- Fully configurable timings, volumes, and cooldowns via Mod Menu. 
  
- Lightweight; virtually no effect on game performance or FPS.


I highly recommend using this mod in conjunction with the Legend of Zelda: Tears of Music soundpack, made for the Reactive Music Mod by CircutLord:

- [LEGEND OF ZELDA: TEARS OF MUSIC PACK](https://mega.nz/file/i1RWVSSb#_WWFFldL2FadTse-sOyx0EAeT-gITeRYApwGpZ5w0u4)

- [Reactive Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music/versions)

Reactive Music Mod Continued for Minecraft 26.1+: 

- [Reactive Music Cont](https://github.com/KevBelisle/ReactiveMusic-Cont)
